name: benefits-processing
description: Analyze government benefits processing software for eligibility determination, application workflow efficiency, document verification, error rates, appeal tracking, multi-program coordination, and ADA/Section 508 compliance. USE THIS SKILL WHEN: user mentions benefits eligibility, SNAP, Medicaid, TANF, WIC, government assistance programs, social services software, eligibility rules engine, caseworker workflow, benefits application processing, or Section 508 accessibility. Trigger phrases: "analyze benefits system", "eligibility determination review", "benefits processing audit", "government program compliance", "caseworker workflow analysis", "appeal tracking review", "benefits application efficiency".
